name: Lyra Health Mental Health Benefits REST API
what_it_does: Lyra Health mental health benefits REST API for employers, health plans, and HR platforms to manage employee mental health benefit enrollment, care navigation, therapy session management, utilization reporting, and wellness program integration — enabling automated EAP benefit administration, member eligibility verification, session authorization, and outcomes tracking through Lyra's employer-sponsored mental health benefits platform. Enables AI agents to manage member eligibility for employee and dependent benefit enrollment verification automation, handle care navigation for therapy session booking and provider matching automation, access session management for authorized mental health session tracking and utilization automation, retrieve utilization reporting for aggregate benefit usage and ROI reporting automation, manage wellbeing check-in for employee wellness assessment and trend tracking automation, handle provider management for therapist network and availability management automation, access authorization for mental health session and service authorization automation, retrieve outcomes tracking for clinical outcome measure aggregation automation, manage population analytics for workforce mental health trend identification automation, and integrate Lyra with HRIS, benefits administration, and health plan systems for mental health benefit automation.
use_cases: Automating employee mental health benefit eligibility verification for HR benefits automation agents
Managing mental health session utilization and reporting for benefits analytics automation agents
Integrating mental health benefit enrollment with HRIS changes for workforce automation agents
Reporting aggregate workforce mental health trends for employer population health agents
not_for: Direct patient clinical care (Lyra's API is for employer benefit administration, not direct clinical EHR integration)
Individual consumer mental health app development (Lyra serves employer-sponsored benefits, not direct-to-consumer apps)
International employee mental health benefits outside Lyra's network markets
best_when: A large employer, health plan, or benefits administrator wanting AI agents to automate employee mental health benefit enrollment, session management, utilization tracking, and outcomes reporting through Lyra's employer-sponsored mental health benefits platform.
avoid_when: EMPLOYER CONTRACT REQUIRED: Lyra Health serves employers and health plans; automated public-developer assumption creates employer_agreement_required; automated must be Lyra Health employer client. PHI HANDLING REQUIRES BAA: Employee mental health data is protected PHI; automated generic-data assumption creates HIPAA_violation for mental health data processing without signed BAA; automated must execute BAA and implement HIPAA-compliant data handling. DE-IDENTIFIED ONLY FOR REPORTING: Lyra provides only aggregate, de-identified reporting to employers; automated individual-level assumption creates HIPAA_access_violation for attempts to access individual employee mental health data; automated must use only de-identified, aggregate reporting endpoints. MEMBER ELIGIBILITY DRIVES ACCESS: Only eligible employees and dependents can access Lyra benefits; automated universal-access assumption creates access_denied for members not enrolled in the employer's Lyra benefit; automated must verify eligibility before benefit interactions.

auth.notes: Lyra Health uses OAuth2 for Mental Health Benefits REST API. REST API with JSON. Burlingame, CA HQ. Founded 2015 by David Ebersman (former Facebook CFO). Raised $910M+ (Coatue Management, General Atlantic). $4.6B+ valuation (2021). Products: Lyra Mental Health Benefit (employer EAP), Lyra Care Navigator, Lyra Coaching. 80+ enterprise clients including Starbucks, Facebook/Meta, Morgan Stanley, NVIDIA. Competes with Spring Health, Modern Health, and Brightside for employer-sponsored digital mental health benefits.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public trial; production requires Lyra employer partnership agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-employee pricing for employer benefit; enterprise custom pricing based on employee count and benefit design
pricing.notes: Burlingame CA. $4.6B valuation. $910M raised. 80+ enterprise clients. Employer mental health benefits leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; benefit administration APIs throttled per employer agreement

known_agent_gotchas: ONLY AGGREGATE DATA IS AVAILABLE: Lyra only provides de-identified, aggregate population data to employers; automated individual-member assumption creates HIPAA_access_violation for attempts to retrieve individual employee mental health records; automated must only request and use aggregate reporting

ELIGIBILITY IS HR-DRIVEN: Employee eligibility in Lyra comes from HRIS feed; automated real-time assumption creates eligibility_lag for newly enrolled employees not yet reflected in Lyra eligibility due to HRIS sync delay; automated must account for eligibility sync latency

SESSION COUNTS ARE PLAN-SPECIFIC: Each employer's Lyra benefit has specific session count and service limits; automated universal-limit assumption creates authorization_exceeded for session requests beyond employer's contracted benefit levels; automated must query employer plan limits before session management

CARE DATA REQUIRES MEMBER CONSENT: Accessing any member care information requires member authorization; automated employer-blanket-access assumption creates unauthorized_access for member care data without explicit member consent; automated must handle consent requirements per HIPAA

REPORTING LATENCY EXISTS: Lyra aggregate reporting has processing latency; automated real-time-utilization assumption creates stale_data for utilization reports accessed immediately after benefit usage; automated must account for reporting latency in analytics workflows
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mental health benefits. HIPAA, SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US. Employee mental health utilization and program data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mental health benefits. HIPAA, SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US. Employee mental health and PHI data.
